_doc: Magic: The Gathering — March of the Machine: The Aftermath (MAT). Source: Wizards 'Collecting March of the Machine' article (https://magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/collecting-march-of-the-machine), which announces The Aftermath as sold in 5-card Epilogue Boosters + 6-card Collector Boosters but provides NO slot breakdowns or drop rates for The Aftermath. Recipe is therefore DERIVED from the set's known micro-set structure (50 cards spanning uncommon/rare/mythic, no commons). authoritative=true. APPROXIMATIONS: (1) The Aftermath had NO Play or Draft Boosters — its 5-card Epilogue Booster is mapped onto our 'draft' pack type as the closest analogue. (2) No official percentages exist for The Aftermath, so rare/mythic and foil splits are reasonable estimates, not Wizards-published numbers. (3) Borderless/showcase 'booster fun' treatments are approximated with the borderless filter on the MAT pool.

draft.tagline: 5-card Epilogue Booster (modeled as draft) · 50-card micro-set · guaranteed rare/mythic + 1 traditional foil · DERIVED (no official Aftermath odds)

collector.tagline: 6-card Collector Booster · all-foil with borderless/extended-art chase · DERIVED (no official Aftermath odds)
